channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WWE star JD McDonagh hits head in high-risk move during match, reveals extent of injuries
item.description: WWE star JD McDonagh smacked his head on "Raw" Monday night after a high-risk move during a tag-team championship match. He revealed the extent of his injuries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Neymar leaves Saudi league having played 7 games as Al-Hilal agrees to terminate his contract
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — Neymar is leaving the Saudi Arabian league after playing just seven games in 17 months following his big-money move to the oil-rich kingdom. Now he could be heading back to boyhood Brazilian club Santos.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Big-time Love: Arizona's Caleb Love hits half-court heave at buzzer in OT win over No. 3 Iowa State
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Caleb Love trotted back, his head down, shoulders slumped after the latest of his missed 3-pointers clanged the back rim. This was not his night — until it was.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Taylor Swift thanks Brittany Mahomes for keeping her calm during intense Chiefs AFC title win
item.description: Taylor Swift had nothing but praise for Brittany Mahomes as the two embraced in the midst of the Kansas City Chiefs' AFC Championship celebration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jason Kelce showed where his loyalty lies in Chiefs-Eagles Super Bowl as old 'New Heights' clip resurfaces
item.description: Jason Kelce has to choose between his brother's Kansas City Chiefs or his Philadelphia Eagles, the team he played 13 seasons for, in Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Love ties it with halfcourt shot at buzzer, Arizona knocks off No. 3 Iowa State 86-75 in OT
item.description: Caleb Love hit a tying heave from beyond halfcourt at the end of regulation and made two more 3-pointers in overtime, finishing with 22 points and lifting Arizona to an 86-75 win over No. 3 Iowa State.
item.dc:creator: John Marshall, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lillard, Antetokounmpo lead Bucks past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Former Weber State star Damian Lillard and Giannis Antetokounmpo and Damian Lillard each scored 35 points to lead the Milwaukee Bucks to a 125-110 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Utah has now lost six straight games, falling to 10-34 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Butler suspended for the 3rd time this month by the Miami Heat as trade deadline looms
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was back from suspension. Again. And then Butler got suspended by the Miami Heat. Again. Butler has been suspended for the third time this month by the Heat, this one starting basically just as the second one was ending.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Trump congratulates Chiefs, 'MAGA' fan base while making bold Bills prediction
item.description: President Donald Trump congratulated the Kansas City Chiefs on heading to their third straight Super Bowl appearance while making a bold prediction about the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brian Schottenheimer says he's 'ready' to coach Cowboys after long career as NFL assistant
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Brian Schottenheimer carried a card in his wallet when he was still in college, inscribed with his goal at the time. Become the youngest head coach in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn, Duke top men's AP Top 25, Texas Tech, Vanderbilt make poll debuts; UConn tumbles to No. 25
item.description: Auburn keeps winning games that come down to the wire. It's kept them on top of the AP Top 25, too. The Tigers were the unanimous choice atop the men's college basketball poll for the second consecutive week Monday, getting all 62 votes from the national media panel. Their place at No.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brittany Mahomes rips Bills fans over 'absolutely disgusting' Week 11 stunt after AFC title win
item.description: Brittany Mahomes had a fiery message for the Buffalo Bills fan base after the Kansas City Chiefs beat their team in the AFC Championship on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Real Salt Lake adds striker Ariath Piol to attacking lineup from Australia A-League
item.description: Real Salt Lake is adding firepower to its attacking lineup, announcing on Thursday the club has signed 20-year-old Australian striker Ariath Piol to the team.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
